title: lithocarpus fissus subsp. tunkinensis
intro: Lithocarpus fissus subsp. tunkinensis, also known as the Tuyen Quang Lithocarpus, is a subspecies of tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae) and is native to Vietnam. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus fissus subsp. tunkinensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is typically combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
